allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "C:/Users/Casto/Desktop/LOSROBOTSSEVOLVIERONLOCOSYATACANALREINO"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "bin/Debug/net9.0/ProyectoSDL2.exe" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $bounds = [System.Windows.Forms.Screen]::PrimaryScreen.Bounds; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($bounds.Width, $bounds.Height\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.CopyFromScreen\($bounds.Location, [System.Drawing.Point]::Empty, $bounds.Size\); $bmp.Save\("$PWD/screenshot.png"\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); if \(-not $p.HasExited\) { Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force }; "Screenshot guardado: $\($bounds.Width\)x$\($bounds.Height\)")

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; foreach \($f in @\("Assets/PantallaFondoMenuMejoras.png","Assets/menuMejora.png","Assets/skills/fondo_mejoras.png"\)\) { $p = Join-Path \(Get-Location\) $f; if \(Test-Path $p\) { $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($p\); Write-Output \("{0} -> {1}x{2}" -f $f, $img.Width, $img.Height\); $img.Dispose\(\) } else { Write-Output \("{0} -> NO EXISTE" -f $f\) } })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $p = Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "Assets/Mapas/MuroAbajoDelMapa.png"; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\($p\); $w=$bmp.Width; $h=$bmp.Height; $firstOpaque=-1; for\($y=0;$y -lt $h;$y++\){ for\($x=0;$x -lt $w;$x++\){ if\($bmp.GetPixel\($x,$y\).A -gt 10\){ $firstOpaque=$y; break } }; if\($firstOpaque -ge 0\){break} }; Write-Output \("tamaño={0}x{1}  primera fila opaca={2}" -f $w,$h,$firstOpaque\); $bmp.Dispose\(\))
